creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 183780
xmp.diff

- Add option to enable the sndio backend.  Unfortunately configure assumes it is
  only available on OpenBSD, so it needs to be patched a little.
- Add new OSS default option to be able to turn off the OSS backend

poudriere testport 11.0/amd64 is ok (with SNDIO and OSS)
